texto: There is a design working behind the curtain of the stars, and we are fulfilling it, drawn toward the future on the tide of time, toward our destiny as the first settlers of a new world."The room was still. He has them, she thought.

frase_original: There is a design working behind the curtain of the stars, and we are fulfilling it, drawn toward the future on the tide of time, toward our destiny as the first settlers of a new world."The room was still. He has them, she thought.

texto: We do matter. To believe that our lives are meaningful is the essence of faith. We are not as large, or as bright, or as eternal as the stars, but we carry humankind's message of love across the galaxy. We are the first. We are the world makers. Our nourishment is hope. Like the tender reed shaking in the wind, we will reach up to a new sun.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Amy Kathleen Ryan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “We do matter. To believe that our lives are meaningful is the essence of faith. We are not as lar…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, faith, esperanca pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e esperanca.
